# yba_nfs_storage_config (Resource)

NFS Storage Configuration for YugabyteDB Anywhere backups.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `backup_location` (String) NFS mount path for backups (e.g., /mnt/nfs/backups).
- `name` (String) Name of the NFS storage configuration.

### Optional

- `nfs_bucket` (String) NFS bucket/directory name within the backup location. Default: yugabyte_backup.
- `region_locations` (Block List) Region-specific backup locations for multi-region backups. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--region_locations))
- `timeouts` (Block, Optional) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--timeouts))

### Read-Only

- `config_uuid` (String) UUID of the storage configuration.
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--region_locations"></a>
### Nested Schema for `region_locations`

Required:

- `location` (String) NFS mount path for this region.
- `region` (String) Region name.

Optional:

- `nfs_bucket` (String) NFS bucket/directory name for this region.


<a id="nestedblock--timeouts"></a>
### Nested Schema for `timeouts`

Optional:

- `create` (String)
- `delete` (String)
- `update` (String)
